description: Helps Montana residents understand SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program) benefits, check eligibility, look up income limits and policy details, and submit benefit applications.
name: Montana SNAP Benefits Agent

skills.description: Search the SNAP benefits knowledge base for eligibility, income limits, how to apply, EBT cards, and more.
examples: Am I eligible for SNAP benefits?
How do I apply for SNAP in Montana?
skills.name: SNAP Benefits Search

skills.description: Get official SNAP policy manual text with exact income thresholds and benefit amounts by household size.
examples: What are the income limits for a family of 4?
How much SNAP benefit would I get?
skills.name: Policy Details Lookup

skills.description: Submit a new SNAP benefits application with applicant details to BigQuery.
examples: I want to submit a SNAP application
skills.name: Submit SNAP Application

skills.description: Retrieve all submitted SNAP benefit applications.
skills.name: List Applications
